# Commercial Marketplace SaaS Accelerator — Infrastructure Module

This Terraform module deploys the complete Azure infrastructure required by the
[Commercial Marketplace SaaS Accelerator](https://github.com/Azure/Commercial-Marketplace-SaaS-Accelerator).

## Features

- **Azure App Service** — Linux Web Apps for Admin Portal and Customer Portal
- **Azure SQL Database** — Managed SQL Server and database with Managed Identity authentication
- **Azure Key Vault** — Secrets management with optional RBAC or access-policy model
- **Virtual Network** — VNet with subnets for web apps and private endpoints
- **Private Endpoints** — Optional private connectivity for SQL and Key Vault
- **Azure AD App Registrations** — Automatic creation or bring-your-own (BYO)
- **Application Deployment** — Optional .NET build & deploy via `local-exec`

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        Resource Group                           │
│                                                                 │
│  ┌──────────────┐   ┌──────────────┐   ┌──────────────┐       │
│  │  Admin Portal │   │Customer Portal│   │  App Service │       │
│  │  (Web App)    │   │  (Web App)    │   │    Plan      │       │
│  └──────┬───────┘   └──────┬───────┘   └──────────────┘       │
│         │                   │                                   │
│  ┌──────┴───────────────────┴──────┐                           │
│  │        Virtual Network          │                           │
│  │  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────────┐ │                           │
│  │  │ Web Subnet│  │  PE Subnet   │ │                           │
│  │  └──────────┘  └──────┬───────┘ │                           │
│  └───────────────────────┼─────────┘                           │
│                          │                                      │
│  ┌───────────────┐  ┌────┴──────────┐                          │
│  │   Key Vault   │◄─┤Private Endpts │──►┌──────────────┐      │
│  └───────────────┘  └───────────────┘   │  SQL Server   │      │
│                                          │  + Database   │      │
│                                          └──────────────┘      │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

<!-- markdownlint-disable MD033 -->
## Requirements

The following requirements are needed by this module:

- <a name="requirement_terraform"></a> [terraform](#requirement\_terraform) (>= 1.5.0, < 2.0.0)

- <a name="requirement_azapi"></a> [azapi](#requirement\_azapi) (~> 2.4)

- <a name="requirement_azuread"></a> [azuread](#requirement\_azuread) (>= 3.0, < 4.0)

- <a name="requirement_azurerm"></a> [azurerm](#requirement\_azurerm) (>= 4.0, < 5.0)

- <a name="requirement_modtm"></a> [modtm](#requirement\_modtm) (~> 0.3)

- <a name="requirement_null"></a> [null](#requirement\_null) (>= 3.2, < 4.0)

- <a name="requirement_random"></a> [random](#requirement\_random) (>= 3.6, < 4.0)

- <a name="requirement_time"></a> [time](#requirement\_time) (>= 0.12, < 1.0)

## Required Inputs

The following input variables are required:

### <a name="input_location"></a> [location](#input\_location)

Description: Azure region where all resources will be deployed (e.g., `swedencentral`, `eastus2`).

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_publisher_admin_users"></a> [publisher\_admin\_users](#input\_publisher\_admin\_users)

Description: Comma-separated list of email addresses granted access to the Publisher Admin Portal (e.g., `user1@contoso.com,user2@contoso.com`).

Type: `string`

### <a name="input_webapp_name_prefix"></a> [webapp\_name\_prefix](#input\_webapp\_name\_prefix)

Description: Prefix used for naming all Azure resources. Must be 3-21 characters, start with a letter, and contain only alphanumeric characters and hyphens.

Type: `string`

## Optional Inputs

The following input variables are optional (have default values):

### <a name="input_ad_application_id"></a> [ad\_application\_id](#input\_ad\_application\_id)

Description: Existing Fulfillment API App Registration Client ID. If empty, a new App Registration will be created.

Type: `string`

Default: `""`

### <a name="input_ad_application_id_admin"></a> [ad\_application\_id\_admin](#input\_ad\_application\_id\_admin)

Description: Existing Admin Portal SSO App Registration Client ID. If empty, a new App Registration will be created.

Type: `string`

Default: `""`

### <a name="input_ad_application_secret"></a> [ad\_application\_secret](#input\_ad\_application\_secret)

Description: Client secret for a pre-existing Fulfillment API App Registration. Leave as `null` when this module creates the app registration.

Type: `string`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_ad_mt_application_id_portal"></a> [ad\_mt\_application\_id\_portal](#input\_ad\_mt\_application\_id\_portal)

Description: Existing Landing Page SSO App Registration Client ID. If empty, a new App Registration will be created.

Type: `string`

Default: `""`

### <a name="input_allowed_client_ip"></a> [allowed\_client\_ip](#input\_allowed\_client\_ip)

Description: Client public IPv4 address to allow on SQL Server during migration and on Key Vault network ACLs. If empty, the deploy step auto-detects via `api.ipify.org`.

Type: `string`

Default: `""`

### <a name="input_app_service_sku"></a> [app\_service\_sku](#input\_app\_service\_sku)

Description: SKU for the App Service Plan. Allowed values: `B1`, `B2`, `B3`, `S1`, `S2`, `S3`, `P0v3`, `P1v2`, `P2v2`, `P3v2`, `P1v3`, `P2v3`, `P3v3`, `P0v4`, `P1v4`, `P2v4`, `P3v4`, `P4v4`, `P5v4`.

Type: `string`

Default: `"B1"`

### <a name="input_deploy_app_code"></a> [deploy\_app\_code](#input\_deploy\_app\_code)

Description: If `true`, build and deploy the .NET application code as part of `terraform apply`. Set to `false` for infrastructure-only provisioning.

Type: `bool`

Default: `true`

### <a name="input_enable_private_endpoints"></a> [enable\_private\_endpoints](#input\_enable\_private\_endpoints)

Description: If `true`, creates private endpoints and private DNS zones for SQL Server and Key Vault. Defaults to `true`.

Type: `bool`

Default: `true`

### <a name="input_enable_telemetry"></a> [enable\_telemetry](#input\_enable\_telemetry)

Description: This variable controls whether or not telemetry is enabled for the module.  
For more information see <https://aka.ms/avm/telemetryinfo>.  
If it is set to false, then no telemetry will be collected.

Type: `bool`

Default: `true`

### <a name="input_is_admin_portal_multi_tenant"></a> [is\_admin\_portal\_multi\_tenant](#input\_is\_admin\_portal\_multi\_tenant)

Description: If `true`, the Admin Portal App Registration is configured as multi-tenant. Defaults to single-tenant.

Type: `bool`

Default: `false`

### <a name="input_key_vault_enable_rbac"></a> [key\_vault\_enable\_rbac](#input\_key\_vault\_enable\_rbac)

Description: If `true`, enable RBAC authorization on Key Vault (recommended). If `false`, use legacy access policies.

Type: `bool`

Default: `false`

### <a name="input_key_vault_name"></a> [key\_vault\_name](#input\_key\_vault\_name)

Description: Name of the Key Vault. Must be globally unique (3-24 chars). Defaults to `<webapp_name_prefix>-kv`.

Type: `string`

Default: `""`

### <a name="input_key_vault_network_default_action"></a> [key\_vault\_network\_default\_action](#input\_key\_vault\_network\_default\_action)

Description: Default action for Key Vault network ACLs. Set to `Allow` during development if your outbound IP cannot be determined. Use `Deny` in production.

Type: `string`

Default: `"Deny"`

### <a name="input_key_vault_purge_protection"></a> [key\_vault\_purge\_protection](#input\_key\_vault\_purge\_protection)

Description: If `true`, enables purge protection on Key Vault. Recommended for production. Note: once enabled, this cannot be disabled.

Type: `bool`

Default: `false`

### <a name="input_key_vault_soft_delete_retention_days"></a> [key\_vault\_soft\_delete\_retention\_days](#input\_key\_vault\_soft\_delete\_retention\_days)

Description: Number of days to retain soft-deleted items in Key Vault. Must be between 7 and 90.

Type: `number`

Default: `90`

### <a name="input_resource_group_name"></a> [resource\_group\_name](#input\_resource\_group\_name)

Description: Name of the resource group. Defaults to the value of `webapp_name_prefix`.

Type: `string`

Default: `""`

### <a name="input_sql_database_name"></a> [sql\_database\_name](#input\_sql\_database\_name)

Description: Name of the SQL Database. Defaults to `<webapp_name_prefix>AMPSaaSDB`.

Type: `string`

Default: `""`

### <a name="input_sql_database_sku"></a> [sql\_database\_sku](#input\_sql\_database\_sku)

Description: SKU name for the Azure SQL Database (e.g., `S0`, `S1`, `S2`, `GP_Gen5_2`).

Type: `string`

Default: `"S0"`

### <a name="input_sql_server_name"></a> [sql\_server\_name](#input\_sql\_server\_name)

Description: Name of the SQL Server (without `.database.windows.net`). Defaults to `<webapp_name_prefix>-sql`.

Type: `string`

Default: `""`

### <a name="input_src_dir"></a> [src\_dir](#input\_src\_dir)

Description: Absolute or relative path to the `src/` directory containing the .NET projects. Defaults to `../src` relative to this module.

Type: `string`

Default: `""`

### <a name="input_subnet_kv_prefix"></a> [subnet\_kv\_prefix](#input\_subnet\_kv\_prefix)

Description: CIDR address prefix for the Key Vault private endpoint subnet.

Type: `string`

Default: `"10.0.3.0/24"`

### <a name="input_subnet_sql_prefix"></a> [subnet\_sql\_prefix](#input\_subnet\_sql\_prefix)

Description: CIDR address prefix for the SQL private endpoint subnet.

Type: `string`

Default: `"10.0.2.0/24"`

### <a name="input_subnet_web_prefix"></a> [subnet\_web\_prefix](#input\_subnet\_web\_prefix)

Description: CIDR address prefix for the web subnet (delegated to Microsoft.Web/serverFarms).

Type: `string`

Default: `"10.0.1.0/24"`

### <a name="input_tags"></a> [tags](#input\_tags)

Description: Map of tags to apply to all resources created by this module.

Example:
```hcl
tags = {
  Project     = "SaaS-Accelerator"
  Environment = "Production"
  ManagedBy   = "Terraform"
}
```

Type: `map(string)`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_tenant_id"></a> [tenant\_id](#input\_tenant\_id)

Description: Azure AD Tenant ID. Defaults to the authenticated provider's tenant if not specified.

Type: `string`

Default: `null`

### <a name="input_vnet_address_space"></a> [vnet\_address\_space](#input\_vnet\_address\_space)

Description: Address space for the virtual network as a list of CIDR blocks.

Type: `list(string)`

Default:

```json
[
  "10.0.0.0/20"
]
```

## Outputs

The following outputs are exported:

### <a name="output_admin_portal_app_id"></a> [admin\_portal\_app\_id](#output\_admin\_portal\_app\_id)

Description: Admin Portal SSO App Registration Client ID.

### <a name="output_admin_portal_identity_principal_id"></a> [admin\_portal\_identity\_principal\_id](#output\_admin\_portal\_identity\_principal\_id)

Description: Managed Identity Principal ID of the Admin Portal Web App.

### <a name="output_admin_portal_name"></a> [admin\_portal\_name](#output\_admin\_portal\_name)

Description: Name of the Admin Portal Web App.

### <a name="output_admin_portal_url"></a> [admin\_portal\_url](#output\_admin\_portal\_url)

Description: URL of the Publisher Admin Portal.

### <a name="output_customer_portal_identity_principal_id"></a> [customer\_portal\_identity\_principal\_id](#output\_customer\_portal\_identity\_principal\_id)

Description: Managed Identity Principal ID of the Customer Portal Web App.

### <a name="output_customer_portal_name"></a> [customer\_portal\_name](#output\_customer\_portal\_name)

Description: Name of the Customer Portal Web App.

### <a name="output_customer_portal_url"></a> [customer\_portal\_url](#output\_customer\_portal\_url)

Description: URL of the Customer Portal (landing page).

### <a name="output_fulfillment_app_id"></a> [fulfillment\_app\_id](#output\_fulfillment\_app\_id)

Description: Fulfillment API App Registration Client ID (for Partner Center Technical Configuration).

### <a name="output_key_vault_id"></a> [key\_vault\_id](#output\_key\_vault\_id)

Description: Resource ID of the Key Vault.

### <a name="output_key_vault_name"></a> [key\_vault\_name](#output\_key\_vault\_name)

Description: Name of the Key Vault.

### <a name="output_key_vault_uri"></a> [key\_vault\_uri](#output\_key\_vault\_uri)

Description: URI of the Key Vault.

### <a name="output_landing_page_app_id"></a> [landing\_page\_app\_id](#output\_landing\_page\_app\_id)

Description: Landing Page SSO App Registration Client ID.

### <a name="output_partner_center_instructions"></a> [partner\_center\_instructions](#output\_partner\_center\_instructions)

Description: Summary of values to configure in Partner Center SaaS Technical Configuration.

### <a name="output_resource_group_id"></a> [resource\_group\_id](#output\_resource\_group\_id)

Description: Resource ID of the deployed resource group.

### <a name="output_resource_group_name"></a> [resource\_group\_name](#output\_resource\_group\_name)

Description: Name of the deployed resource group.

### <a name="output_resource_id"></a> [resource\_id](#output\_resource\_id)

Description: The resource ID of the resource group.

### <a name="output_sql_database_id"></a> [sql\_database\_id](#output\_sql\_database\_id)

Description: Resource ID of the SQL Database.

### <a name="output_sql_database_name"></a> [sql\_database\_name](#output\_sql\_database\_name)

Description: Name of the SQL Database.

### <a name="output_sql_server_fqdn"></a> [sql\_server\_fqdn](#output\_sql\_server\_fqdn)

Description: Fully qualified domain name of the SQL Server.

### <a name="output_sql_server_id"></a> [sql\_server\_id](#output\_sql\_server\_id)

Description: Resource ID of the SQL Server.

### <a name="output_tenant_id"></a> [tenant\_id](#output\_tenant\_id)

Description: Azure AD Tenant ID used for the deployment.

### <a name="output_virtual_network_id"></a> [virtual\_network\_id](#output\_virtual\_network\_id)

Description: Resource ID of the Virtual Network.

### <a name="output_virtual_network_name"></a> [virtual\_network\_name](#output\_virtual\_network\_name)

Description: Name of the Virtual Network.

### <a name="output_webhook_url"></a> [webhook\_url](#output\_webhook\_url)

Description: Webhook URL to configure in Partner Center SaaS Technical Configuration.

## Modules

No modules.

## Data Collection

The software may collect information about you and your use of the software and send it to Microsoft. Microsoft may use this information to provide services and improve our products and services. You may turn off the telemetry as described in the repository. There are also some features in the software that may enable you and Microsoft to collect data from users of your applications. If you use these features, you must comply with applicable law, including providing appropriate notices to users of your applications together with a copy of Microsoft’s privacy statement. Our privacy statement is located at <https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?LinkID=824704>. You can learn more about data collection and use in the help documentation and our privacy statement. Your use of the software operates as your consent to these practices.
